debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
C : Category α
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
hm : @CategoryInContext.Category.Mono α C X Y f
he : @CategoryInContext.Category.split_epi α C X Y f
⊢ IsIso f

proof:
rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  refine ⟨g, hg, retraction_epi f g hg _ _ ?_⟩
  rw [← assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]
failed_attempts:
obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  refine ⟨g, hg, ?_⟩
  apply hm
  rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  use g
  constructor
  · apply hm
    rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]
  · exact hg

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  have : g ≫ f = id Y := by
    apply hm
    rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]
  exact ⟨g, hg, this⟩

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  use g
  constructor
  · exact hg
  · apply retraction_epi f g hg
    rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  refine ⟨g, hg, hm ?_⟩
  rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]

rcases he with ⟨g, hfg⟩
  refine ⟨g, hfg, hm (by rw [assoc, hfg, id_comp, comp_id])⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  have hf : Epi f := retraction_epi f g hg
  exact ⟨g, hg, hf _ _ (by rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id])⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  have hf := retraction_epi f g hg
  refine ⟨g, hg, hf (g ≫ f) (id Y) (by rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id])⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  have hf_epi : Epi f := retraction_epi f g hg
  exact ⟨g, hg, hf_epi _ _ (by rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id])⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  refine ⟨g, hm ?_, hg⟩
  rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  have hgf : g ≫ f = id Y := by
    apply hm
    rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]
  exact ⟨g, hg, hgf⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  have hf : g ≫ f = id Y := by
    apply hm
    rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]
  exact ⟨g, hg, hf⟩

section_mono g f hg
  have hf : g ≫ f = id Y := hg' (g ≫ f) (id Y) (by rw [assoc, hg, comp_id, id_comp])
  exact ⟨g, hg, hf⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  exact ⟨g, hg, retraction_epi f g hg _ _ (by rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id])⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  exact ⟨g, hg, hm _ _ (by rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id])⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  have hf : Epi f := retraction_epi f g hg
  exact ⟨g, hg, hf _ _ (by rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id])⟩

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  refine ⟨g, hg, hm ?_⟩
  rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  refine ⟨g, hg, retraction_epi f g hg (by rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id])⟩

cases he with g hg
  have hgf : g ≫ f = id Y := retraction_epi f g hg _ _ (by rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id])
  exact ⟨g, hg, hgf⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  refine ⟨g, hg, retraction_epi _ _ hg _ _ ?_⟩
  rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  have hgf : g ≫ f = id Y := by
    apply hm
    rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]
  exact ⟨g, hg, hgf⟩

let ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  have hf : Epi f := retraction_epi f g hg
  exact ⟨g, hg, hf _ _ (by rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id])⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  refine ⟨g, hg, hm ?_⟩
  rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  exact ⟨g, hm (by rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]), hg⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  exact ⟨g, hg, retraction_epi f g hg (by rw [← assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id])⟩

cases' he with g hg
  exists g
  constructor
  · exact hg
  · apply hm
    rw [← assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  have hf : Epi f := retraction_epi f g hg
  refine ⟨g, hg, hf (g ≫ f) (id Y) (by rw [assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id])⟩
successful_attempts:
rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  refine ⟨g, hg, retraction_epi f g hg _ _ ?_⟩
  rw [← assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  refine ⟨g, hg, retraction_epi f g hg _ _ ?_⟩
  rw [← assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  have hf : Epi f := retraction_epi f g hg
  have hgf : g ≫ f = id Y := by
    apply hf
    rw [← assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]
  exact ⟨g, hg, hgf⟩

rcases he with ⟨g, hg⟩
  exact ⟨g, hg, retraction_epi f g hg (g ≫ f) (id Y) (by rw [← assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id])⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := he
  refine ⟨g, hg, retraction_epi f g hg _ _ ?_⟩
  rw [← assoc, hg, id_comp, comp_id]
